name: Bible Puzzle: Christian Game
short_description: Bible Puzzle offers a relaxing and uplifting experience as you piece together beautiful biblical scenes. When you’re fully relaxed, it’s time to take on the challenge of ranked matches. Think you’ve got what it takes to beat other players?
detailed_description:
Bible Puzzle is an educational and relaxing game, perfect for all ages, from children to adults. Designed as an excellent option for family leisure, the game offers difficulty levels starting from just 4 pieces, allowing even the youngest players to have fun and learn while assembling biblical scenes.

As you start the game, players are invited to select a biblical image to assemble. Each image represents a significant passage from the Scriptures, and upon completing the puzzle, short clips are shown to tell the story behind the image, providing an educational and uplifting experience.

STORYTELLING:

Each puzzle pack includes video stories that provide context about the images in the pack.

CLICK & SWAP:

Click on one piece, then click on a second piece to swap their positions.

DRAG & DROP:

Simply drag a piece to swap it with any other piece.

ACHIEVEMENTS

Unlock achievements by completing specific challenges, enhancing engagement and fun.

KEY FEATURES:

  • Various difficulty levels: Choose the ideal challenge level for yourself or your children, with options ranging from just 4 pieces to many more, adapting to the player’s skill level.

  • Global and friend rankings: Engage in healthy competition with friends and players worldwide. Each image has its own ranking, encouraging repeat play and improvement.

  • Inspiring background music: Enjoy melodies inspired by the poetic books of the Bible, such as Job, Psalms, Proverbs, Ecclesiastes, and Song of Songs, creating a calm and introspective atmosphere while you play.

  • Regular content updates: New additional content will be released periodically as DLCs, offering new images and biblical stories to explore and assemble.

  • Educational experience: Beyond being fun, the game also offers a learning opportunity about biblical stories, making screen time more meaningful.

Bible Puzzle is more than just a game; it’s a fun and educational way to explore the Scriptures as a family, ensuring that both you and your children are engaged in a safe and enriching activity. Download now and start assembling these beautiful biblical stories!

supported_languages:
English*, Spanish - Spain*, Portuguese - Brazil*, German*, Simplified Chinese, Japanese, Korean, Russian
*languages with full audio support
